summary.lv: AvaFin meklē Data Engineer ar 3+ gadu pieredzi datu inženierijā, ar fokusu uz batch pipeline piegādi, Airflow orķestrāciju un Spark batch darbu izstrādi. Atbalstīs biznesa komandas ETL procesu migrēšanā uz koplietotu platformu.
summary.en: AvaFin is hiring a Data Engineer with 3+ years in data engineering, focused on batch pipeline delivery — Airflow orchestration, Spark batch jobs, and helping business teams migrate ETL processes onto a shared, governed platform.
